scope: Promote CE2 as the launcher-selected chunked loss setting for the retained 8xMI350 target-shape canary only.

launcher_change.behavior: If CANARY_CHUNKED_CE_NUM_CHUNKS is unset and the exact retained 8x target shape is selected, the launcher exports TORCHTITAN_DSV4_CHUNKED_CE_NUM_CHUNKS=2. Other shapes keep the TorchTitan ChunkedCELoss default of 8 unless explicitly overridden.

read: CE2 is a positive no-profile target-shape A/B and lowers peak logged memory versus the retained CE8 run.
The follow-up launcher-default validation left CANARY_CHUNKED_CE_NUM_CHUNKS unset, observed chunked_ce_num_chunks=2 in the run header, and passed two steps at 3103 tok/GPU/s.
CE4 and CE1 both passed but regressed on step-2 throughput, so they are not retained.
This is a near-term canary lever for the loss/lm-head bucket; it does not replace the larger MoE overlap/VJP or final sparse-MLA/LI work.
